projects.title: BDH Website
projects.decription: A responsive website for Botshabelo Digital Hub, built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This platform serves as a digital presence for the hub, providing information about its services and initiatives.

projects.title: Movie Dashboard
projects.decription: A dynamic movie dashboard web application developed using React, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, and the OMDb API. This application allows users to search for movies, view detailed information, and explore trending films.

projects.title: Personal Profile
projects.decription: A developer portfolio website designed with React, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. This platform showcases my technical skills, projects, and professional experience in a visually appealing and user-friendly manner.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.decription: A web-based weather application built with React, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, and the OpenWeather API. This app provides real-time weather updates, including temperature, humidity, and forecasts based on user input.
